Class ExpressionConstants

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.internal.ExpressionConstants
public final class ExpressionConstants extends Object
Shared constants for DynamoDB expression syntax: placeholder names, logical operators, and function names.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    AND
    AND operator with surrounding spaces.
    static final String
    ATTRIBUTE_EXISTS
    attribute_exists(path) function name.
    static final String
    ATTRIBUTE_NOT_EXISTS
    attribute_not_exists(path) function name.
    static final String
    BEGINS_WITH
    begins_with(path, substr) function name.
    static final String
    CONTAINS
    contains(path, operand) function name.
    static final String
    DT
    Discriminator expression attribute name placeholder.
    static final String
    GE
     
    static final String
    IF_NOT_EXISTS
    if_not_exists(path, default) function name.
    static final String
    LE
     
    static final String
    LIST_APPEND
    list_append(list1, list2) function name.
    static final String
    OR
    OR operator with surrounding spaces.
    static final String
    PK
    Partition key expression attribute name placeholder.
    static final String
    PK_COMPONENT
    Entity key component name for partition key (@KeyComponent(component = "PK")).
    static final String
    PK_VAL
    Partition key expression attribute value placeholder.
    static final String
    SIZE
    size(path) function name.
    static final String
    SK
    Sort key expression attribute name placeholder.
    static final String
    SK_COMPONENT
    Entity key component name for sort key (@KeyComponent(component = "SK")).
    static final String
    SK_VAL0
    Sort key (lower bound) expression attribute value placeholder.
    static final String
    SK_VAL1
    Sort key (upper bound) expression attribute value placeholder.
